title: Neo Vitae
description: Spill blood for power. Altars that consume life, sigils that bend the world, custom demons in an endless dungeon, sentient armor that drinks souls, a shield that pays your damage in essentia. Datapack-driven from the ground up.
body:
# NeoVitae

> _A magical mod where blood is the currency of power. Harvest it, refine it, weave it into rituals and runes, and bend the world to your will._

You begin with a diamond and a wound. From those first crimson drops, you'll build an altar capable of devouring entire ecosystems, network your soul to the anima network that transcends dimensions, forge demons into tools, and rip a hole in reality to reach a demonic dimension whose only inhabitants want you dead. A blood themed magical journey written with both player experience and modpack makers in mind.

## The Ara Vitae

The heart of the mod is the **Ara Vitae**. A multiblock altar that consumes **Essentia Vitae (EV)** to transmute items. Drop in a Blood Orb and the altar starts sharing your **Anima**, a personal pool of essentia that follows you from world to world, dimension to dimension, container to container.

Six **tiers** of construction shape what the altar can do, from a bare stone box that crafts cheap reagents up through six rings of runes (Speed, Acceleration, Charging, Capacity, Sacrifice, Dislocation, Orb, and their **Reinforced** counterparts) that bend the altar's behavior to your strategy. Cap stones at the higher tiers drive **alchemy array projections** that float above the structure during work, each tier producing more elaborate visual circuitry. Six tiers of Orbs of Vitae carry the network's capacity up to civilizational scale.

## Sigils & Tools

Drop a Blood Orb into a Tabula Vitae with the right reagents and out comes a **Sigil**. A one-handed tool that performs a specific job at a specific essentia cost.

*   **Sigil of the Blood Light**. Toss a configurable colored light source onto any surface; brightness, hue, and redstone sensitivity are all tweakable on the placed light or before-throw.
*   **Sigil of Holding**. Carry up to nine other sigils at once and cycle between them with a hotkey.
*   **Magnetism, Air, Water, Lava, Void, Phantom Bridge, Teleposition, Suppression, Seer**. The rest of the standard utility kit, reworked to feel responsive and informative.
*   **Bound** weapon and tool variants that draw durability from your Anima instead of physical metal.
*   **Many More**

## Living Arts: Flasks, Anointments, Sentient Armor

The **Tabula Vitae** is a six-input alchemical bench that brews two distinct families of consumable:

*   **Alchemy Flasks**. Reusable potion containers with custom effect components and configurable duration tiers.
*   **Anointments**. Tool and weapon coatings applied without taking the item out of your hand. _Iron Tip_ on a bow for 25% more damage; _Archer's Polish_ for 50% more velocity; _Looting_, _Fortune_, _Silk Touch_, _Smelting_, _Voiding_, _Quick Draw_, _Hidden Knowledge_, _Weapon Repair_, _Holy Water_, _Bow Power_, and _Melee_ coatings deplete with use rather than time.

The **Hellfire Forge** crafts **Sentient** weapons and armor, equipment that drinks the souls of mobs you kill and grows stronger from it.

## The Sanguine Ward

Hold any tier of Blood Orb and your essentia pool begins to weave a **Sanguine Ward** around you, a personal shield that absorbs incoming damage at a steady cost in EV per second. Tank a creeper, walk through arrows, finish a delicate ritual under fire; the ward burns through your Anima before it lets you take the wound. Fully configurable in the server config so packs can tune it to their balance.

## Rituals (30+ and growing)

The Master Ritual Stone and its rune complement let you anchor permanent or one-shot rituals across the world.

  - Crystallum Fractura. Auto-harvests Spiritus Crystal clusters in range with a Fortune scaling bonus.
  - The Torment Nexus. Binds nearby spawners and trial spawners, suppressing their spawns and siphoning a stream of EV and loot from the simulated kills.
  - Highway to Hell. Opens a permanent gateway to an endless, procedurally generated demon dungeon.
  - Well of Suffering. Drains life from nearby mobs to feed your altar.
  - Ritual of Overgrowth. Bonemeals nearby crops and saplings; Spiritus aspects add farmland hydration, plant-leeching, and scaled growth.
  - Plus Cry of the Forsaken Soul, Ritual of Harvest, Ritual of Fallen Trees, Ritual of Accelerated Aging, The Endless Quarry, Hymn of Siphoning, Serenade of the Nether, Ritual of Meteo, Ritual of the Full Spring, Ritual of Containment, Ritual of Expulsion, The Sinner's Burden, Dome of Suppression, Ritual of Regeneration, Ritual of Speed, The Gathering, Soaring Skies (true flight), Ritual of the Phantom Bridge, Dawn of the New Moon, Ritual of the Mason, Rhythm of the Beating Anvil, Ritual of the Satiated Stomach, All Consuming Void, Sentient Extraction, and Ritual of Sentient Evolution... and many more.

Every ritual is driven by a **data map** for stats. Modpack makers retune costs, ranges, and effects in a JSON without recompiling.

## Spiritus & Crystals

A second, parallel resource layer. **Spiritus** is the latent magical energy of the world, divided into five aspects; **Raw**, **Ruina** (decay), **Nihilum** (void), **Vindicta** (vengeance), and **Invictus** (resilience). Hostile mob kills feed an aspect-aligned pool stored per-player. **Spiritus Crystals** placed in the world draw the local field into harvestable clusters, biased toward whichever aspect you've configured. Crystals power sentient weapons, advanced upgrades, and several rituals.

## The Endless Dungeon

The **Dungeon dimension** is a procedurally-assembled underground network of corridors, ore caverns, mining stations, libraries, smithies, antechambers, arenas, and crypts, every room a hand-authored structure shuffled and stitched by jigsaw generation.

Inhabiting it is a roster of **many custom demons** built from the ground up. None are reskins of vanilla mobs.

*   **Daemonium Ignis**. Fire-bound striker
*   **Daemonium Cruoris**. Armored melee guardian
*   **Daemonium Glaciaris**. Frost mage
*   **Daemonium Pestis**. Disease vector
*   **Daemonium Rancoris**. Ranged spite-archer
*   **Daemonium Animaris**. Spirit drainer
*   **Daemonium Corrodis**. Armor stripper
*   **Daemonium Doloris**. Pain-channeler
*   **Daemonium Fervidis**. Heat aura
*   **Daemonium Voraxis**. Devourer

Each has its own **attack animations**, layered sound design, spawn-invulnerability windows, self-stun timings during heavy attacks, death-particle bursts, and a custom **drop table** that feeds back into progression. Trial spawners across the dungeon scale with player count.

## Atmosphere & Polish

A lot of work went into making the magic _feel_ magical:

*   **Custom altar animation** with floating rods, ritual circle projections, and cascade particles during active crafts.
*   **Procedural stream effects**. Life essence threads visibly between altars, capacitors, and tanks during transfers.
*   **Custom blood particles**. Flames, glow, droplets, snare wisps, blood-stream chains.
*   **Tier-specific visuals** that ramp from a subtle red shimmer at tier 1 to actively reshaping the air above the structure at tier 6.
*   **Modonomicon-powered guidebook**. _Scriptura Vitae_, with **parallax category backgrounds**, custom recipe page types for every machine, and prose written to actually teach the systems rather than dump bullet points.
*   **Tooltips everywhere**. Sigils, anointments, rituals, automation slot configuration, all annotated.

## Quality of Life

*   **Tabula Vitae** ships with per-side hopper/pipe configuration. Click a slot to activate it, then click direction buttons to toggle which faces can insert or extract. Buttons hide themselves when no slot is selected so the GUI stays clean.
*   **JEI integration** with custom recipe categories for every machine type.
*   **Jade tooltips** for altars, tanks, batteries, and routing nodes.
*   **Curios support** for the Training Bracelet and other equippable items.
*   **Sigil of Ritual Diviner** rotates through known ritual layouts in-world, color-coding required runes.
*   **Routing Node** network for item, fluid, and energy transport with priority controls and per-side filter ghosting.

## Built for Pack Makers

Nearly everything is **datapack driven**:

*   Ritual stats live in `data/<namespace>/data_maps/ritual_stats/`.
*   Sigil costs and behavior in `sigil_stats`.
*   Imperfect ritual stats in their own data map.
*   All recipe types (Ara Vitae, Tabula Vitae, Hellfire Forge, Athanor, Alchemy Array, Flask, Living Downgrade) read from JSON with proper codecs.
*   A live **materials.json** drives the entire material processing chain (raw → fragment → gravel → dust → ingot). Add a new material with its color and ore tag, restart, and an in-memory pack auto-generates models, recipes, tags, and lang entries.
*   **Telepose blacklist** is a block tag pack authors can edit.
*   **Block/item tags** organized under the `c:` namespace where appropriate.
*   Custom dungeon rooms can be added without code by dropping an NBT structure and a small JSON definition.

KubeJS-compatible, with every machine's recipe builder reachable from scripts.

## Roadmap

NeoVitae is being treated as a **living project**. Planned and in-flight work:

*   More **rituals** focused on world-shaping and automation.
*   Additional **demons** for the dungeon, including boss-tier encounters.
*   Expanded **Sentient equipment** tree with cross-piece synergies.
*   An entirely new Sanguine Sorcery System…
*   **Performance passes** as content density grows.
*   **Modpack integration support**. If your pack runs NeoVitae and you want a hook or a tweak, let us know and we're happy to work with you.

Community feedback drives priorities. The issue tracker and Discord are the best places to weigh in on what gets built next.

## Quick Start

1.  Find your first diamond and a flat patch of stone.
2.  Place a single Ara Vitae block and stand next to it. Right-click the diamond into it and wait as the altar draws blood from nearby players to provide some EV into it.
3.  Once enough EV has accumulated the diamond will transform. Take the Novicius Orb of Vitae that comes out. Bind it to yourself with a right click.
4.  Open _Scriptura Vitae_, the guidebook actually explains the rest of checkout our wiki.

The blood is yours. Spend it wisely.

## Attribution

Neo Vitae is a derivative work based on [BloodMagic](https://github.com/WayofTime/BloodMagic) by WayofTime, licensed under the [Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/). Neo Vitae has been substantially modified from the original source, including a full NeoForge 1.21.1+ rewrite, data-driven systems, custom visual effects, new gameplay mechanics, and modern registration patterns.
